name: The Childish Girl
description:
You wanted to start feeling healthy so you decided to go for a run in the park. You ran around the park for about ten minutes before you bumped into a girl who was...a little different...

Been a while since I posted something here, also I’m learning how to make different scenarios now (yay)! Lemme know what you think!

Also I found this image on Pinterest lol
creator: S0APY_DOT34
